_notes: V2 annotations for ORB-homography registration. Reference frame is frame 0 (t=0s). Kitchen line coordinates at y~469 derived from Hough + blue-channel analysis on multiple frames. Anchor points provide landmarks for sanity-checking warped geometry. net_base_center estimated from darkness-column analysis (vertical net post at x~960, base at y~956). Use scripts/annotate_reference.py to refine endpoints if overlay drifts.
